{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323182052B04D39FD5555B10A0BDC"}"},"total":4209},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7450148784442524441","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个视角的三国文，少见，人物塑造也挺好的（少许人物也完美的以最佳理由年龄小砍，但塑造的挺成功），剧情也没什么问题，主公有了一个主公应该有的样子（武力是为了自保而不是让主公上阵的，主公要做的事情也很到位，听取意见总结归纳，也有利用历史人物提前收纳培养），多女主的前置条件.原因也写出来了，中间战场剧情挺棒的，说实话给我看的都激动起来了。也没有因为后代知识就盲目，而是选择一步一步发展。真的给了一种雄主的感觉。不过缺点嘛，主角气势描写emmm感觉不太到位，甚至有点啰嗦。可以试着改变一下这一点问题，比如加一些与主角对位对话之后的心里描写来侧面突出一下这个气势。虽然这么写其实也挺合理的，毕竟古代官民面见皇帝应该大概也许就有类似的感觉吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734627621,"group_id":"7437320377891572761","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwQcJln0zdKxIugqeNwbv6c=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"767878833373672","user_name":"斗丹的梁永生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"767878833373672","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7437320377891572761","book_info":{"abstract":"【三国】【无敌】【争霸】【真皇叔】​【系统】
众朝皆以衰而亡，独汉以强而亡？
四百载王朝遍地烽燧，万物凋敝，百姓哭嚎。
十三州吃的遍地白骨，道路两旁的沃野都埋葬不下。
有人纵横捭阖，有人仗剑行侠，庙堂与战场，皆如冢中枯骨。
“大丈夫生当五鼎食，死亦五鼎烹。”
刘牧驾车御马，挽弓提刀，身后是剑戟森森的大汉王师，为这天灾人祸俱存的乱世，送来一场肃清天下的寒风。
将苟存的乱军残党，扫入历史尘埃。
PS：文献考究＋演绎，究极缝合怪，不合理之处请见谅","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f4c51922a8d046096309f963c6b83427","author":"不吃烟火","author_id":"","book_id":"7437320377891572761","book_name":"三国：我，真皇叔，三兴大汉","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7437320597958296089","read_count":"69767","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1342755"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"638","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,三国,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o46f5411e4894a00dfd597706f9dbd549~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445252&x-signature=z82h%2F9RVlfXSYd2BNztWJLDcg%2BU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3184648320195133","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"90"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323182052B04D39FD5555B10A0BDC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19059,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":55376},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7448626144533398296","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"听说是隔壁来的老作者，写的很好。
有系统，但戏份不大，主要加了点个人战力。
对当时事件的分析挺有说服力的，有自己的理解。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734272540,"group_id":"7437320377891572761","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6F90M3173VrZjh3Z8qJA90=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7278aed4050c4b3cae94d2f9669887b5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793243&x-signature=MxwfZvgu5AjzHFmShRhhZVsGVXA%3D","user_id":"399878116871319","user_name":"往生缘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"399878116871319","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7437320377891572761","book_info":{"abstract":"【三国】【无敌】【争霸】【真皇叔】​【系统】

isten_duration":15571,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":29491,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":20767},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7457713765098816281","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这才是刘宏，这才是我知道的关羽，作者真的把他们写活了，新闻推荐，大家看一看，我觉得有很多人喜欢看评论区，但是这本书真的很符合他的评分"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736387825,"group_id":"7437320377891572761","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"404210910501656"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7437320377891572761","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"269"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33225,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":21},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7451137444466098969","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者加油，会好起来的。写的真的很好，现在的评分还是低了，作者的文笔和知识储量，在番茄作者里应该也算是前列了吧？尤其是三国小说里，不过我觉得颜良文丑还是可以争一下的，张河应该也出现了，然后鲁肃也可以收到手里，周瑜太小可以留个准备，其他的我感觉都差不多了，毕竟汉末可以的，也就鲁肃，诸葛亮，都是能稳住一个国家团体不乱的根基，主角都可以收到手里了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734857803,"group_id":"7437320377891572761","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"想写好，仅此而已，多了再谈","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7rzFl7mwYfoPjcpavoqLLk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d15eaaadad8d4853885a24bfe1bbbd7f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790237&x-signature=3r59gZ%2Bvx9fCKM8kqO9dKQnx42w%3D","user_id":"404210910501656","user_name":"我是业绩高手"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"404210910501656","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776651171,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7437320377891572761","book_info":{"abstract":"【三国】【无敌】【争霸】【真皇叔】​【系统】
